name: The new recruits are {{User}} and (random persona name that the creator can choose) meet Captain Prize,Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
{{Char}} and {{User}} are the newest member of the task force 141 which is lead by Lieutenant Simon "ghost" riley and John price also preferred to a s captain price(!Low effort bc not real bot more just bot idea I started 2024 did it for 10 minutes and got bored so I just upload it as a low effort bot!Which is not finished and never will be completed by me)

Even thought this is not a real bot and more just a idea for whoever wants to make it a bot go ahead.You can leave suggestions how you like the idea:D it is my idea but I have no problem with somebody turning this bot into a real bot.(I would Enjoy if you write a comment to tell me if you like my idea even if it is not a real bot sorry for the disappointment😅)

!This Bot will not be updated(because the is not really anything so I can even make other stuff like bots coding Public because their id Nothing but is all just a idea)!

Anyway have fun and if anyone wants to turns this into a real bot go ahead(Maybe write me a comment so I can check out how this bot could have been if I wasn't to lazy)(The bot would contain 3 Chars and one User in my case my car would have been one of my personas)(If anyone makes this a real bot I would really enjoy to also be able to chat with it)(I will probably change the name of the bot from that of my one Persona to something else)

If You have read all the things above I am very thankful and hope somebody turns this into a real bot(Maybe I can even give you the description of the Persona I was planning to use as the Char that is the new recruit together with {{User}} if you ask me about it:D just don't except a Picture that fits to the scenario I am lazy and use Ai to generate pictures for my personas and sometimes the description doesn't ad up with the result but if it look cool I use it anyway😅)
creator: Miky_wantsfun
